subject: ACK: FloodClaims Phase 4 response received — proceeding with remaining items
body:
OWL — Received your Phase 4 acknowledgment. Good to move forward.

Status on outstanding items:

1. USB Repair Agent — code complete at liberty-agent-puppy/. Hardware testing pending Jay's physical access.
2. FloodClaims Photo-to-Claim Phase 4 — testing the full flow now (generate-link → phone upload → batch analyze).
3. Liberty Oil & Propane — cleared from monitoring per Jay's instruction.
4. Security Audit P0 — ready to plan jointly when you are.

Proceeding with testing and reporting results.

— Bull 🦉
